name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Kissimmee's Value Pawn & Jewelry on N Main Street provides fast pawn loans, gold buying, and jewelry sales with same-day cash.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates at 1924 N Main St, Suite A in downtown Kissimmee, FL, positioned on one of the city's primary commercial streets. This independent pawn shop is a go-to destination for Kissimmee locals needing quick cash without a bank application or credit check. Hours are Monday–Friday 9 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 9 AM to 6 PM, and Sunday 12 PM to 5 PM, making it easy to stop by on your schedule.

The Kissimmee location buys gold, jewelry, electronics, and other valuables outright, or offers pawn loans where you can retrieve your items later. The staff can quickly assess items and provide same-day cash. For specific questions about what qualifies for a loan, pricing, or terms, contact the shop directly at 407-847-6565.

Residents and visitors in Kissimmee, FL often turn to this N Main Street pawn shop when they need cash fast and don't qualify for traditional bank loans. Bring a valid photo ID and the items you want to pawn or sell. The team completes transactions with minimal paperwork, so you're in and out quickly.
address: 1924 N Main St Ste. A, Kissimmee, FL 34744

company_info.headquarters: 1924 N Main St Ste. A, Kissimmee, FL 34744

pros: EZ+ Rewards program earns points on pawns, redemptions, and purchases — manageable online
Online Instant Quote tool for electronics lets you estimate value before visiting
Online payments available for pawn extensions and layaway installments
Layaway requires only 10% down with easy monthly payments
Pre-owned merchandise sold at 25–70% off typical retail prices
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed loan amounts, free stone replacement, and free cleaning
Sunday hours (12–5 pm) available — uncommon for financial services locations
cons: Pawn loan fees and APRs are not disclosed on the website — consumers must ask in-store
EZPAWN corporate ownership means pricing and terms are standardized, not negotiable
"Take Today" BNPL option depends on third-party credit eligibility — not available to all
No information on loan limits, redemption periods, or forfeiture policies online
Firearms sold on premises — relevant for consumers with household safety concerns
best_for: People needing immediate cash without a credit check or bank account
Bargain shoppers seeking discounted pre-owned electronics, jewelry, or tools
Individuals looking to sell or get an appraisal on gold, diamonds, or broken jewelry
Buyers who want layaway or flexible payment options on pre-owned merchandise
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for consumers who need fast, no-credit-check cash access using personal property as collateral, or those hunting for steeply discounted pre-owned goods. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs are not disclosed online — fees can be significantly higher than conventional credit — so this should be treated as a last-resort cash option rather than a primary financial tool.
services: Gold and diamond buying (all karats and weights tested in-store)
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Instant Quote tool for electronics (online, no visit required)
EZ+ Rewards program (points on eligible transactions)
Jewelry VIP Protection Program (guaranteed loan value, free cleaning, stone replacement)
Product Protection Plan for electronics and merchandise
Online payments for pawn extensions and layaway
meta_description: Value Pawn & Jewelry on N Main St in Kissimmee, FL — cash loans, gold buying, jewelry sales. No credit check, same-day cash.
